report.summary: UX audited 4 new learn guides (Wallet Security, Restaking Comparison, DeFi Lending, DeFi Yield Aggregators), created 2 OG images (1200x630 SVG), and implemented 14 UX refinements including critical bug fixes, semantic HTML, accessibility, and responsive improvements.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: DeFi Lending page: Removed invalid 'use client' directive that conflicted with Next.js metadata export — critical bug fix preventing SSR metadata
DeFi Lending page: Fixed component imports from wrong path (@/lib/structured-data → individual @/components/* imports)
DeFi Lending page: Fixed StructuredData prop name from schema={} to data={} matching project convention
DeFi Lending page: Fixed OG image reference from non-existent og-defi-lending-2026.jpg to new og-defi-lending-protocol-comparison-2026.svg
DeFi Lending page: Made H1 responsive using clamp(28px, 5vw, 48px) instead of fixed 48px
DeFi Lending page: Added Home link to Breadcrumb for consistent navigation
DeFi Lending page: Converted ToC from <div> to semantic <nav> with aria-label
DeFi Lending page: Wrapped content in semantic <article> tag for SEO and accessibility
DeFi Lending page: Added role='region', aria-label, tabIndex, and WebkitOverflowScrolling to comparison table for accessible mobile scrolling
DeFi Yield page: Fixed duplicate style prop bug (React only applies last style prop, losing base styles)
DeFi Yield page: Added aria-label to ToC nav element
DeFi Yield page: Wrapped content in semantic <article> tag
DeFi Yield page: Added role='region', aria-label, tabIndex, and WebkitOverflowScrolling to comparison table
Wallet Security page: Converted ToC from <div> to semantic <nav> with aria-label

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: defi-lending-protocol-comparison-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with protocol TVL bar chart (Aave $40B+, Morpho $5.8B, Compound $3B+, Fluid $1.9B), DeFi/Lending/Comparison badges, $45B+ total lending stat card

OG image: defi-yield-aggregators-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with 4 protocol cards (Yearn $1B+, Beefy $316M+, Pendle $5B+, Sommelier $100M+), DeFi/Yield/Guide badges, APY ranges, $1.7B+ sector stat

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Deferred)
items: Style inconsistency across pages: Lending uses glass callouts with indigo border; Yield uses standard boxes; Wallet uses custom color system — recommend shared article layout component
FAQ styling differs: Lending uses H3+P blocks; Yield and Wallet use card-based boxes — recommend standardizing
No data freshness indicators on any page — recommend adding 'Data via CoinGecko' trust signals per design system
Restaking Comparison exists as data-only (learn-20260327.ts) but has no page.tsx — needs scaffolding or dynamic route rendering
